name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with a template, workflow, or example
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

Describe the problem clearly.

## File or Workflow

Which file or workflow is affected?

Example:

- `workflows/pr-review.md`
- `prompts/ocr-reformat-template.md`

## Expected Behavior

What did you expect to happen?

## Actual Behavior

What happened instead?

## Suggested Fix

If you have an idea, describe it here.

## Additional Context

Add any examples, screenshots, or related notes.
